# Whatweb

```zsh
┌──(koshi㉿kali)-[~/PEN-200/Skylark/VM15]
└─$ whatweb -v -a3 --log-verbose WebEnum/whatweb_60001.txt http://$TargetIP:60001
WhatWeb report for http://192.168.222.223:60001
Status    : 200 OK
Title     : <None>
IP        : 192.168.222.223
Country   : RESERVED, ZZ

Summary   : Apache[2.4.41], HTTPServer[Ubuntu Linux][Apache/2.4.41 (Ubuntu)]

Detected Plugins:
[ Apache ]
        The Apache HTTP Server Project is an effort to develop and 
        maintain an open-source HTTP server for modern operating 
        systems including UNIX and Windows NT. The goal of this 
        project is to provide a secure, efficient and extensible 
        server that provides HTTP services in sync with the current 
        HTTP standards. 

        Version      : 2.4.41 (from HTTP Server Header)
        Google Dorks: (3)
        Website     : http://httpd.apache.org/

[ HTTPServer ]
        HTTP server header string. This plugin also attempts to 
        identify the operating system from the server header. 

        OS           : Ubuntu Linux
        String       : Apache/2.4.41 (Ubuntu) (from server string)

HTTP Headers:
        HTTP/1.1 200 OK
        Date: Sun, 15 Feb 2026 01:07:18 GMT
        Server: Apache/2.4.41 (Ubuntu)
        Last-Modified: Thu, 08 Dec 2022 11:39:51 GMT
        ETag: "119-5ef4f7ebc5573-gzip"
        Accept-Ranges: bytes
        Vary: Accept-Encoding
        Content-Encoding: gzip
        Content-Length: 200
        Connection: close
        Content-Type: text/html
```

# Enumeration

## index

- 募金用ページのようで、ソースコードを見ても特に何も情報はない

## catalog

- ホスト名をつけると、Webの表示が変わったから、CMS使ってるかも


## docs

- relase_notes.pdf から得た情報：
	- osCommerce Online Merchant v2.3.4 を使っている
	- Modified Filesにファイル名の一覧が乗っている（"account.php"など）
